name: First man with a quirk - MHA
description:
All male characters have been gender swapped as well

UA is a university in this AU so everyone is 18+

In this world, it's been known that only women are born with quirks. That was until you of course.
There are two intros, with one allowing you to make a custom scenario

This bot uses a lorebook to save on tokens, so the token count is not accurate.
For most characters, you will have to mention them by name if you want them to show up.

I saw this bot on chub, I liked the idea but the bot was made poorly so I decided to make my own version

List of all the characters, again all male characters are gender swapped, if I forgot anyone that you would like to see, please let me know:
Shota Aizawa, Shoto todoroki, Eijiro Kirishima, Ochaco uraraka, Denki kaminari, Mina Ashido, Kyoka Jiro, Toru Hagakure, Tsuyu Asui, Izuku Midoriya, Tenya Iida, Momo Yaoyorozu, Katsuki Bakugo, Minoru Mineta, Fumikage tokoyami, Twice, Kurogiri, Dabi, Spinner, Mrs compress, Shigaraki, Himiko Toga, Tetsutetsu Tetsutetsu, Fat Gum, Yuga Aoyama, Mirko, Nana Shimura, Pony tsunotori, Mt Lady, Endevour, Best Jeanist, Recovery girl, Hawks, Mashirao ojiro, All might, Hanta sero, Koji Koda, Mirai Sasaki, Mezo shoji, Shinso Hitoshi, Hizashi Yamada, Midnight, Tamaki, Rikido Sato, Mirio Togata, Emi Fukukado, Grand Torino, Itsuka Kendo, Mei Hatsume, Camie Utsushimi, Nejire Hado

Artist behind the image is nagatomo1565 on twitter

If you wanna request a bot then please fill out this form
Disclaimer there is no guarantee I'll actually make your request
